steps.title: Identify the location-specific information in the notes
steps.content: The student must indicate the location of the Isthmus of Ierapetra. The notes provide a direct statement about location: “The Isthmus of Ierapetra is located in the Mediterranean Sea.”

steps.title: Find which choice incorporates this specific information
steps.content:
Choice D — The Isthmus of Ierapetra is located in the Mediterranean Sea, where it connects the Siteia municipality to the rest of the island of Crete. uses the location statement and adds the relevant contextual detail about what the Isthmus connects.

Choices A, B, and C either present general definitions of an isthmus or merely mention the Isthmus as an example, without conveying where it is geographically.

That matches Choice D — The Isthmus of Ierapetra is located in the Mediterranean Sea, where it connects the Siteia municipality to the rest of the island of Crete..
